top_signals.title: ECB reports on progress towards euro adoption
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan Dollar Set to Face Pressure From Record Dividend Payouts
top_signals.summary: The Taiwan dollar, which is on track for its first quarterly gain in a year, may face renewed pressure as the US currency strengthens and local companies boost dividend payouts to a record.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: U.S.-China tech rivalry heats up—in other countries
top_signals.summary: U.S. and Chinese tech companies are increasingly pursuing opportunities outside their home markets, with government policy support.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

European Commission Speech Luxembourg, 26 Jun 2026
